component.name: 1bit systems
component.summary: Local AI inference on Strix Halo

description.p: Local AI inference stack for AMD Strix Halo (Ryzen AI Max+ 395, gfx1151). Ships BitNet-1.58 ternary LLM, Qwen3-TTS text-to-speech, whisper.cpp STT, native-HIP SDXL image generation, and Wan 2.2 TI2V-5B video generation. XDNA2 NPU authoring via IRON + MLIR-AIE.
All media engines are pure C++. Orchestration layer is Rust. No Python at serving time; serving path is HIP kernels + libxrt + ggml.
NPU toolchain verified on npu5 via IRON (axpy 160/160). Five media lanes live. Complete-pack meta-target landed. AppImage 31 MB.
